name: memcpy_off
title: memcpy_off
syntax: void memcpy_off( struct type dest, dword destOffset, byte source[], dword sourceOffset, dword length); // form 1
description: Copies bytes from a source to destination, giving a destination start offset. The size of the destination must be at least destOffset + length.

parameters.name: dest
parameters.description: (form 1, 2): Struct into which the bytes shall be copied.(other forms): Array into which the bytes shall be copied.
